summary: Targeted regression: verified two CSS/layout overlap fixes on Rajat portfolio at desktop 1920x800. Both bugs are FIXED.

bug_fix_1_hero_perf_toggle_vs_coords.notes: perf-toggle moved to bottom-right (right:24, bottom:24). coords label remains at bottom-left and is visible. No horizontal or vertical overlap.

bug_fix_2_about_stats_grid_overlap.notes: 4 stat tiles arranged in 2x2 grid with no horizontal/vertical overlap. Constraint max(right of left col) <= min(left of right col) satisfied (1391.5 <= 1452.5).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero perf-toggle now positioned bottom-right (right:24, bottom:24) and About stats grid is 2x2 with ~61px horizontal gap. Both regressions verified at 1920x800. Preloader ~2s. Note: at this viewport the nav-about click scrolls but About section's stat tiles are at y=376 (top of viewport range after scroll). Confirmed via getBoundingClientRect.
